Lead Product Manager

Cortex Labs — Transforming customer insights into intelligent product decisions

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-first, onsite 2x per month)

Employment Type

Full-time

Compensation

$175,000 - $235,000 USD

The Opportunity

Join Cortex Labs as a Lead Product Manager to lead our Analytics Platform team and drive the vision for

our core product offering. You'll manage a cross-functional team of 4-5 engineers, work closely with

design and data teams, and own end-to-end strategy for a key product vertical. This is an ideal role for

an experienced PM ready to develop product leadership skills while maintaining hands-on involvement

with strategy, roadmap, and execution. You'll report to the VP of Product and work directly with executive
stakeholders to define company-level product direction.

About Cortex Labs

Cortex Labs is a Series B SaaS company building AI-powered analytics and product intelligence
platforms. We enable product teams at mid-market and enterprise companies to understand user
behavior, prioritize features, and ship products faster. Founded in 2021, we're backed by top-tier

investors and serve 200+ customers across fintech, health tech, and e-commerce. Our mission is to
democratize advanced product analytics so every team can build with confidence.

Day-to-Day

Lead and mentor a team of 4-5 engineers, conducting 1:1s, performance reviews, and fostering a

culture of ownership and execution excellence

Own the full product lifecycle for the Analytics Platform: define strategy, manage quarterly roadmaps,
and align team to north star metrics using Amplitude and Mixpanel analytics

Partner with design and engineering leads to scope features, evaluate trade-offs, and ship high-impact
products on schedule

Conduct SQL-based analysis of user behavior data in Postgres and Snowflake to uncover insights
that drive product decisions

Define and track OKRs for your product area; use cohort analysis, funnel metrics, and retention
curves to validate product-market fit

Manage stakeholder relationships across executive leadership, support, and customer success;

communicate product strategy and progress monthly

Identify and recruit top engineering talent for your team; build hiring scorecards and participate in

technical interviews

 Drive process improvements across product planning, design sprints, and launch procedures;

establish team norms for documentation and knowledge sharing

Represent the product org in technical deep-dives; review architecture proposals and help engineering

optimize for user experience and scalability

You Have

6+ years of product management experience, with at least 2 years leading or mentoring product and

engineering teams

Proven expertise in B2B SaaS, data/analytics products, or developer tools; ability to think like both a

user and an engineer

Strong SQL skills; comfortable writing and interpreting queries on large datasets to validate product

hypotheses

Hands-on experience with analytics platforms (Amplitude, Mixpanel, or similar) for defining metrics,

building dashboards, and conducting user cohort analysis

Track record of shipping 2+ major products or features end-to-end; ability to communicate product
strategy clearly to engineers and stakeholders

Experience building and managing cross-functional teams (engineering, design, data, support) in a

fast-paced, iterative environment

Bonus

Prior experience at a high-growth series B/C company or scaling to 100-500 employees

Experience with technical product management for infrastructure, APIs, or backend systems

Familiarity with modern product stack tools (Figma, Jira, Looker, dbt) and data governance practices

Background in computer science, data science, or similar technical field, or self-taught technical

product expertise

Our Stack

Amplitude   Mixpanel   SQL (Postgres, Snowﬂake)   Figma   Jira   Looker   Python (for analytics scripts)   Segment

dbt   Tableau

What We Offer

Competitive equity package (0.25%-0.5% depending on experience)

Medical, dental, vision, and mental health coverage (100% employee, 75% dependent)

Unlimited PTO + 10 company holidays; parental leave (16 weeks primary, 12 weeks secondary)

Commuter benefits, home office stipend ($1,500 annually), and annual learning budget ($2,500)

Team offsites 2x per year in exciting locations; quarterly product engineering social events

Inclusive benefits: fertility benefits, gender-affirming care, adoption assistance, and dependent care

FSA

 401k with 4% company match, life insurance (3x salary), and short/long-term disability

Apply

Apply directly via our careers page at careers.cortexlabs.io/lead-pm, or reach out to our VP of Product,

Alex Chen, at alex@cortexlabs.io. Please include a resume, cover letter, and 1-2 examples of products

you've shipped (links or descriptions) that showcase your impact. We review applications on a rolling

basis and move quickly for strong candidates. Candidates will participate in a 4-stage interview process:

30-min screen with recruiter, 45-min PM screen (strategy case), 90-min take-home assignment (product

critique), and executive round with VP of Product and CEO.
nice_to_have: Prior experience at a high-growth series B/C company or scaling to 100-500 employees
Experience with technical product management for infrastructure, APIs, or backend systems
Familiarity with modern product stack tools (Figma, Jira, Looker, dbt) and data governance practices
Background in computer science, data science, or similar technical field, or self-taught technical
